select_perm_and_friends.solution:
Lemma select_perm: forall i l,
  let (j,r) := select i l in
   Permutation (i::l) (j::r).
Proof.
  intros i l; revert i.
  induction l; intros; simpl in *.
  - apply Permutation_refl.
  - bdestruct (i >=? a).
    + destruct (select i l) as [j l'] eqn:E.
      specialize (IHl i). rewrite E in IHl.
      apply perm_trans with (a :: j :: l').
      * apply perm_skip. assumption.
      * apply perm_swap.
      Restart.
  intros i l; revert i.
  induction l; intros; simpl in *.
  - apply Permutation_refl.
  - bdestruct (i >=? a).
    + destruct (select i l) as [j l'] eqn:E.
      specialize (IHl i). rewrite E in IHl.
      eauto.
    + destruct (select a l) as [j l'] eqn:E.
      specialize (IHl a). rewrite E in IHl.
      eauto.
Qed.

Lemma select_biggest_aux:
  forall i al j bl,
    Forall (fun x => j >= x) bl ->
    select i al = (j,bl) ->
    j >= i.
Proof.
  intros i al; revert i; induction al; intros; simpl in *.
  - inv H0. lia.
  - bdestruct (i >=? a).
    + destruct (select i al) as [j' bl'] eqn:E. inv H0.
      apply IHal with bl'. inv H. assumption. reflexivity.
    + destruct (select a al) as [j' bl'] eqn:E. inv H0.
      apply IHal with bl'. inv H. assumption. reflexivity.
Qed.

Theorem select_biggest:
  forall i al j bl, select i al = (j,bl) ->
     Forall (fun x => j >= x) bl.
Proof.
  intros i al; revert i; induction al; intros; simpl in *.
  - inv H. constructor.
  - bdestruct (i >=? a).
    + destruct (select i al) eqn:E. inv H.
      constructor.
      * apply select_biggest_aux in E. lia.
        apply IHal with i. reflexivity.
      * apply IHal in E. assumption.
    + destruct (select a al) eqn:E. inv H.
      constructor.
      * apply select_biggest_aux in E. lia.
        apply IHal with a. reflexivity.
      * apply IHal in E. assumption.
Qed.
select_perm_and_friends.explanation: Adapted from Selection.v proofs for max instead of min. select_perm uses eauto; select_biggest_aux and select_biggest use induction with Forall reasoning.

simple_priq_proofs.solution:
Lemma delete_max_None_relate:
  forall p, priq p -> (Abs p nil <-> delete_max p = None).
Proof.
  intros. split; intros.
  - inv H0. simpl. reflexivity.
  - destruct p.
    + constructor.
    + simpl in H0. discriminate.
Qed.

Lemma delete_max_Some_relate:
  forall (p q: priqueue) k (pl ql: list key), priq p ->
   Abs p pl ->
   delete_max p = Some (k,q) ->
   Abs q ql ->
   Permutation pl (k::ql) /\ Forall (ge k) ql.
Proof.
  intros. inv H0. inv H2.
  unfold delete_max in H1.
  destruct pl.
  - simpl in H1. discriminate.
  - simpl in H1.
    destruct (select k0 pl) as [j bl] eqn:E.
    inv H1.
    split.
    + pose proof (select_perm k0 pl). rewrite E in H0. assumption.
    + apply select_biggest in E. assumption.
Qed.

Lemma merge_relate:
    forall p q pl ql al,
       priq p -> priq q ->
       Abs p pl -> Abs q ql -> Abs (merge p q) al ->
       Permutation al (pl++ql).
Proof.
  intros. inv H1. inv H2. inv H3.
  unfold merge. apply Permutation_refl.
Qed.
simple_priq_proofs.explanation: delete_max_None: empty priqueue has no elements. delete_max_Some: use select_perm and select_biggest. merge: since Abs is identity, merge is just append.
